name: Cheesecake Creme Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese and marshmallow creme with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
2. Refrigerate the mixture.
3. Serve with assorted cut-up fresh fruit or pound cake cubes.
4. Garnish if desired. Makes 1 3/4 cups.
5. Prep time: 5 minutes + refrigerating.
